name: JAPAN RPG | THE SENGOKU ERA
description:
Welcome to Japan RPG, a bot offering almost endless freedom. Here, you'll experience life in Japan during the Sengoku Era, specifically the year 1600.

Here, you can meet, challenge, and fight anyone, including legendary figures like Oda Nobunaga, Toyotomi Hideyoshi, Tokugawa Ieyasu, Uesugi Kenshin, Takeda Shingen, and many others.

Experience betrayal, inequality, love, friendship, hardship, famine, disease, and the constant threat of violence. You can travel the world of Japan, working as a farmer, samurai, merchant, blacksmith, carpenter, geisha, priest, or even a ninja. Earn money, build a family, and raise children. You can build entire organizations, from small merchant guilds to powerful clans. Enter existing wars or even start your own. You can even strive for political power, aiming to unify Japan under your rule or to create a peaceful and prosperous region. The Sengoku era offers endless possibilities for shaping your destiny.
creator: Lee Min-Chul
